_comment: 100 000 headwords, all 4 pre-processing steps take 5+ minutes on ESP32-C3. Each definition is ~900 bytes; 8 synonyms per word. Raw .dict ~84 MB -> ~21 MB compressed; raw .syn ~24 MB -> ~7-9 MB compressed. Reduce word_count if .dict.dz exceeds 25 MB; increase if processing is too fast.

meta.name: prep-all
meta.author: CrossPoint Test Suite
meta.description: Large synthetic dictionary for pre-processing timing tests on ESP32-C3.
meta._comment: generate_fpi intentionally absent — device generates idx.fpi and syn.fpi

synthetic._comment_word_prefix: selects the large prep-all definition template
